==Must-Not-Name ♂==
A shabby-looking wizard; Forbidden name, unpleasant looks, knows few spells, and bad SFX!

===Begin Friendship===
To obtain Must-Not-Name, completely defeat the {{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Stone|orange}} mirage.

===☆☆☆ > ★★★===
After 5 letters back and forth, Must-Not-Name will move in permanently with his minion, [[Minions|Frost Drake]].

==Rent==
[[File:Must-Not-Name rent.png|frameless|left]]

Must-Not-Name rent is collected on '''Sunday''' and appears as a lit candelabra on the table.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +10|blue}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +10|purple}}; {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +10|orange}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Menorah|blue}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Anathema Scroll|green}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Bloodthirsty Scroll|green}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Stone Skin Scroll|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Offering Speedup!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★
|Offering Speedup +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|Offering Speedup +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|Offering Speedup +4h
|}<br>

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Eye of Medusa}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Ranjyatai Incense}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Fallen Lucifer}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Sorron's Eye}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Mahakala Scroll}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Forbidden Fruit}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Blood of Cain}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{ImageWithLink|Artificial Blackhole}}
|}

==Nameless Black Magic==
Although nameless and average, this black magic is still good enough to scare someone...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FTH +5||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +30s
|-
|2||180||2k||FTH +10||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +1m
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FTH +15||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +1m30s
|-
|4||200||8k||FTH +20||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +2m
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FTH +25||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +2m30s
|-
|6||220||18k||FTH +30||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +3m
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FTH +35||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +3m30s
|-
|8||240||32k||FTH +40||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +4m
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FTH +45||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +4m30s
|-
|10||260||50k||FTH +50||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +5m
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FTH +55||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +5m30s
|-
|12||285||72k||FTH +60||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +6m
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FTH +65||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +6m30s
|-
|14||315||98k||FTH +70||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +7m
|-
|15||330||112k||FTH +75||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +7m30s
|-
|16||345||123k||FTH +80||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +8m
|-
|17||360||144k||FTH +85||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +8m30s
|-
|18||375||162k||FTH +90||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +9m
|-
|19||390||180k||FTH +95||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +9m30s
|-
|20||400||200k||FTH +100||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +10m
|-
|21||420||220k||FTH +105||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +10m30s
|-
|22||440||242k||FTH +110||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +11m
|-
|23||460||264k||FTH +115||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +11m30s
|-
|24||480||285k||FTH +120||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +12m
|-
|25||500||309k||FTH +125||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +12m30s
|-
|26||520||333k||FTH +130||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +13m
|-
|27||540||357k||FTH +135||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +13m30s
|-
|28||560||381k||FTH +140||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +14m
|-
|29||580||405k||FTH +145||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +14m30s
|-
|30||600||429k||FTH +150||Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +15m
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Nameless Black Magic is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +10
|-
|2||4k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +20
|-
|3||6k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +30
|-
|4||8k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +40
|-
|5||10k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +50
|-
|6||12k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +60
|-
|7||14k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +70
|-
|8||16k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +80
|-
|9||18k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +90
|-
|10||20k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +100
|-
|11||22k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +110
|-
|12||24k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +120
|-
|13||26k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +130
|-
|14||28k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +140
|-
|15||30k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +150
|-
|16||32k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +160
|-
|17||34k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +170
|-
|18||36k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +180
|-
|19||38k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +190
|-
|20||40k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +200
|-
|21||42k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +210
|-
|22||44k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +220
|-
|23||46k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +230
|-
|24||48k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +240
|-
|25||50k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +250
|-
|26||55k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +260
|-
|27||60k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +270
|-
|28||65k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +280
|-
|29||70k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +290
|-
|30||75k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop ATK +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Must-Not-Name specializes in '''Dragon Genes''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Dragon is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Frost Drake==
Before a dragon of the Weset dies, it will fly to the cold north and bury itself in the snow for a chance to become a frost dragon after death!

===Special Ability - Frozen Aura===
Per 10 Frost Drakes in battle, Troop Water DMG +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Frost Drakes!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Traveler Manual}}
|Frost Drake HP +1%
|Frost Drake DEF +1%
|Frost Drake ATK +1%
|Frost Drake RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Musketeer Mask}}
|Frost Drake HP +1%
|Frost Drake DEF +1%
|Frost Drake ATK +1%
|Frost Drake RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Voynich Manuscript}}
|Frost Drake HP +2%
|Frost Drake DEF +2%
|Frost Drake ATK +2%
|Frost Drake RUSH +2%
|Frost Drake All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Peacock Suit}}
|Frost Drake HP +2%
|Frost Drake DEF +2%
|Frost Drake ATK +2%
|Frost Drake RUSH +2%
|Frost Drake All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Bronze Shiva Statue}}
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|Frost Drake HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Creation of Adam}}
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|Frost Drake DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Relativity Scripts}}
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|Frost Drake ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{ImageWithLinkAndBreak|Encyclopedia}}
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|Frost Drake RUSH +4%
|-
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
